title: FastAPI CRUD service with Pydantic, validation, and proper status codes
when: Building a Python REST API / backend service with create-read-update-delete resources
principle: Pydantic models for request/response; routes return real data + correct status codes; validate inputs and raise HTTPException with clear messages; keep a runnable entrypoint (uvicorn app:app); list every 3rd-party import in requirements.txt.
exemplar: if iid not in _db: raise HTTPException(404, 'Item not found')
pitfalls: Don't return bare dicts without response_model; don't skip 404/422 handling; don't forget requirements.txt or the entrypoint.
